WHY RAIN SOUNDS HELP SLEEP:
Heavy rain creates natural white noise that masks disruptive sounds. The steady sound of rain triggers your relaxation response, reducing cortisol levels and preparing your body for deep restorative sleep. Many people with sleep disorders find that rain sounds help them sleep instantly.
